scope: offline static parity; electrical GPIO and runtime IRQ behavior are excluded

comparisons.surface: ELF, modinfo, KMI and reproducible build

comparisons.evidence: 3600 bytes, 900 instructions, 164 relocations, 228 blocks, 387 edges and 67 calls on both sides
stage4 harnesses cover 15 of 24 stock functions

blockers: gpio_keys_probe is not opcode-identical and has 21 ordered relocation mismatches
nine microtasks lack direct isolated harness coverage
controlled NX809J hardware validation is deferred
